overview.description: The AllianzIM U.S. Small Cap Buffer15 ETF (QBKF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to track the share price returns of the iShares Russell 2000 ETF (IWM), up to a cap, while providing a buffer against the first 15% of losses, over a three month outcome period, less expenses. The fund used FLEX options to create the exposure. QBKF was launched on Mar 31, 2026 and is issued by Allianz.
